target:
# Get the actual page from wayback machine with a specific timestamp
SSH_AUTH_SOCK= ssh -i ~/.ssh/atom -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@72.60.80.232 "curl -s -L --max-time 30 'https://web.archive.org/web/20080615120000/http://www.everestpoker.com/en/poker-client/screenshots/'" 2>&1 | grep -i "img\|screenshot\|table\|game\|client\|\.jpg\|\.png\|\.gif" | head -40
